title: Ender Chest On A Stick
description: Adds a portable hand-held ender chest (on a stick) that you can open by right-clicking with it in your hand.
body:
This mod adds an Ender Chest on a Stick that allows you to open your ender chest GUI without placing any blocks. To open, just right-click while holding it in your hand. ![In-game example:](https://i.imgur.com/WhRTGBB.png)   ![In-game example of the GUI](https://i.imgur.com/VbJs978.gif)   ![Crafting recipe:](https://i.imgur.com/j5n5GRp.png) ![Barrel On A Stick Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1298663/description_152d6cd3-a6b8-46d3-bf49-fe6fc480d550.png)   ![Notes:](https://i.imgur.com/KCIZ7RA.png)  

 The Ender Chest on a stick opens your normal Ender Chest GUI, without creating a separate one.

 

Feel free to add this mod to your modpack!

 

If you have any idea that you would like to see in this mod, please leave a comment!
